name: NEW PEOPLES BANKSHARES INC
summary: New Peoples Bankshares, Inc. is a Virginia financial holding company headquartered in Honaker, Virginia, operating primarily through New Peoples Bank, Inc. The Bank offers commercial loans, residential mortgages, consumer loans, construction loans, deposit accounts, and investment services via New Peoples Financial Services division. It also provides insurance referral services through NPB Insurance Services, Inc. and title insurance through a minority stake in Lonesome Pine Title Agency, LLC. The Bank operates 17 full-service branches across Virginia, West Virginia, North Carolina, and Tennessee.
